message:
fix(nudge): add flock-based cross-process lock to prevent interleaved delivery (gt-6ywt)

Each `gt nudge` CLI invocation is a separate OS process. The existing
in-process channel semaphore provides no cross-process serialization.
When multiple agents simultaneously nudge the same target, the multi-step
delivery protocol interleaves, producing garbled or empty input.

Adds flock(2)-based filesystem lock in NudgeSessionWithOpts gated by a
new TownRoot field on NudgeOpts. All NudgeSession calls in the CLI path
now pass TownRoot to enable cross-process locking.

From: PR #3040 by seanbearden

Co-Authored-By: Sean Bearden <seanbearden@users.noreply.github.com>
